text: I can't checkout. Clicked the button, but it just sits there. Sometimes it works, but today nothing.

I am currently experiencing an issue while attempting to complete my purchase on your website. Specifically, when I click the checkout button, it seems that the page does not respond as expected; instead, I am confronted with a perpetual loading spinner that never resolves. I am using Safari version 17, and I have ensured that my internet connection is stable. Could you please assist me with this concern?
I am unaable to receive the verification codes after changing my email address. Please assist.

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with the product I received. It has not met the expectations set by your advertising, leading me to believe that it would perform significantly better. Unfortunately, it has been quite unsatisfactory, and I feel compelled to voice my concerns.

I am curious to know whether you offer any sort of discounts specifically for students, and if such discounts are available, could you please provide me with detailed instructions on how I might go about applying for them?
